name: Think Research Corporation
summary: Think Research Corp., an investment holding company, develops and provides clinical software and services for the health care industry. The company's products portfolio includes order sets that structures clinical pathway at the point of care; Progress Notes, which helps frontline clinical teams to align their documentation in a standardized digital note shared across all team members; eReferrals that allows physicians to find and refer specialists directly from EMR systems; VirtualCare, which allows clinicians and allied health professionals to replace in-person appointments with virtual visits; and eforms, a real-time analytics to track resident volumes, signature adherence, and compliance, as well as decision support tools for seniors living in long-term care and retirement homes. It serves in Canada, the United States, Latin America, Europe, Australia, and the Middle East. Think Research Corp. is based in Toronto, Canada.
